testcase.name: @regression API — /api/postcode/lookup › SW1A 1AA returns 200 with 12 addresses
@regression API — /api/postcode/lookup › EC1A 1BB returns 200 with 0 addresses
@regression API — /api/postcode/lookup › missing postcode returns 400
@regression API — /api/postcode/lookup › invalid postcode format returns 422
@regression API — /api/postcode/lookup › XSS input returns 422
@regression API — /api/postcode/lookup › BS1 4DJ — first call returns 500, second call returns 200 with 3 addresses
@regression API — /api/waste-types › general waste returns { ok: true }
@regression API — /api/waste-types › plasterboard with option returns { ok: true }
@regression API — /api/waste-types › plasterboard without option returns 400
@regression API — /api/waste-types › missing required fields returns 400
@regression API — /api/skips › heavyWaste=false returns 8 enabled skips
@regression API — /api/skips › heavyWaste=true returns 3 disabled skips (12/14/16-yard)
@regression API — /api/skips › skip schema has required fields
@regression API — /api/skips › missing heavyWaste param returns 400
@regression API — /api/booking/confirm › valid request returns success with BK- bookingId
@regression API — /api/booking/confirm › missing required field returns 400
@regression API — /api/booking/confirm › two rapid POSTs both return unique bookingIds
@regression empty postcode shows "Please enter a postcode"
@regression invalid postcode format shows validation error
@regression XSS input is rejected with validation error
@regression SQL injection input is rejected with validation error
@regression EC1A 1BB shows no-addresses empty state
@regression API error shows error message and retry button
@regression plasterboard without option keeps Continue disabled
@regression back navigation preserves selections
@regression double-submit prevention — only one POST fires
@regression browser back button — app recovers gracefully
@regression mobile 375px — no horizontal overflow on Step 1
@regression mobile 375px — no horizontal overflow on Step 3 (skip grid)
@smoke — complete general waste booking flow
@smoke — heavy waste booking with disabled skip verification
